---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: _bibliography/papers.bib
page-layout: full
---


## Preprints

<!-- 
[5] **Jun Yamamoto**, Ivan Bonamassa, and Márton Pósfai.
"Laplacian eigenmode localization in physical complex networks."
Submitted (2026). 
-->

[4] **Jun Yamamoto**, Ivan Bonamassa, and Márton Pósfai.
"Localization transitions of diffusion dynamics in physical networks."
Submitted (2026).


## Journal articles


[3] Marta Niedostatek, Anthony Baptista, **Jun Yamamoto**, Jurgen Kurths, Ruben Sanchez Garcia, Ben MacArthur, and Ginestra Bianconi. 
"Mining higher-order triadic interactions."
Nature Commununications **16**, 11613 (2025).
\[[paper](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-66577-z)\]
\[[arXiv](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2404.14997)\]
\[[code](https://github.com/anthbapt/trim)\]

[2] Kousuke Yakubo, Gentaro Shimojo, **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Random walks on bifractal networks."
Physical Review E **110**, 064318 (2024).
\[[paper](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.110.064318)\]
\[[arXiv](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2407.16183)\]

[1] **Jun Yamamoto** and Kousuke Yakubo. 
"Bifractality of fractal scale-free networks."
Physical Review E **108**, 024302 (2023).
\[[paper](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevE.108.024302)\]
\[[arXiv](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2304.13438)\]



## Theses


[MSc] **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Modelling higher-order network dynamics in presence of triadic interactions."
Master Dissertation, Queen Mary University of London (2023). 
<!-- \[[pdf](./assets/files/thesis/MSc_dissertation.pdf)\] -->

[BEng] **Jun Yamamoto**. 
"Bifractality of fractal scale-free networks."
Bachelor Thesis, Hokkaido University (2022).
<!-- \[[pdf](./assets/files/thesis/BEng_thesis.pdf)\] -->
